---
title: "3888 lasso"
output: html_document
date: "2026-04-07"
---

```{r}
library(data.table)
library(glmnet)
setwd("/Users/ansonding/3888")
files <- list.files(
  path = "individual_book_train",
  pattern = "\\.csv$",
  full.names = TRUE
)
qlike <- function(y, yhat, eps = 1e-8) {
  y <- pmax(y, eps)
  yhat <- pmax(yhat, eps)
  mean(y / yhat - log(y / yhat) - 1)
}



# STEP 4. 单只股票数据处理函数

make_stock_data <- function(file_path) {
  

  # 读取数据

  dt <- fread(file_path)
  
  # 提取stock_id
  stock_id_num <- as.integer(gsub(".*stock_|\\.csv", "", file_path))
  dt[, stock_id := stock_id_num]
  
  # 排序
  setorder(dt, time_id, seconds_in_bucket)
  

  # WAP
  
  dt[, wap1 := (bid_price1 * ask_size1 + ask_price1 * bid_size1) /
                (bid_size1 + ask_size1)]
  
  dt[, wap2 := (bid_price2 * ask_size2 + ask_price2 * bid_size2) /
                (bid_size2 + ask_size2)]
  
  dt <- dt[
    is.finite(wap1) & wap1 > 0 &
    is.finite(wap2) & wap2 > 0
  ]
  
  
 
  # log returns
  
  dt[, log_ret1 := c(NA_real_, diff(log(wap1))), by = time_id]
  dt[, log_ret2 := c(NA_real_, diff(log(wap2))), by = time_id]
  
  
  
  # 市场结构变量
  
  dt[, spread1 := ask_price1 - bid_price1]
  dt[, spread2 := ask_price2 - bid_price2]
  
  dt[, volume1 := bid_size1 + ask_size1]
  dt[, volume2 := bid_size2 + ask_size2]
  dt[, volume_total := volume1 + volume2]
  
  dt[, imbalance1 := (bid_size1 - ask_size1) /
                      (bid_size1 + ask_size1)]
  
  dt[, imbalance2 := (bid_size2 - ask_size2) /
                      (bid_size2 + ask_size2)]
  

  # 前5分钟 / 后5分钟

  first_half  <- dt[seconds_in_bucket <= 300]
  second_half <- dt[seconds_in_bucket > 300]

  # 前5分钟特征
 
  features <- first_half[, .(
    
    # Price
    bid_price1_mean = mean(bid_price1, na.rm = TRUE),
    ask_price1_mean = mean(ask_price1, na.rm = TRUE),
    bid_price2_mean = mean(bid_price2, na.rm = TRUE),
    ask_price2_mean = mean(ask_price2, na.rm = TRUE),
    
    bid_price1_sd = sd(bid_price1, na.rm = TRUE),
    ask_price1_sd = sd(ask_price1, na.rm = TRUE),
    bid_price2_sd = sd(bid_price2, na.rm = TRUE),
    ask_price2_sd = sd(ask_price2, na.rm = TRUE),
    
    # Size
    bid_size1_mean = mean(bid_size1, na.rm = TRUE),
    ask_size1_mean = mean(ask_size1, na.rm = TRUE),
    bid_size2_mean = mean(bid_size2, na.rm = TRUE),
    ask_size2_mean = mean(ask_size2, na.rm = TRUE),
    
    bid_size1_sd = sd(bid_size1, na.rm = TRUE),
    ask_size1_sd = sd(ask_size1, na.rm = TRUE),
    bid_size2_sd = sd(bid_size2, na.rm = TRUE),
    ask_size2_sd = sd(ask_size2, na.rm = TRUE),
    
    # WAP
    wap1_mean = mean(wap1, na.rm = TRUE),
    wap2_mean = mean(wap2, na.rm = TRUE),
    wap1_sd = sd(wap1, na.rm = TRUE),
    wap2_sd = sd(wap2, na.rm = TRUE),
    
    # Return / volatility
    rv_first_wap1 = sqrt(sum(log_ret1^2, na.rm = TRUE)),
    rv_first_wap2 = sqrt(sum(log_ret2^2, na.rm = TRUE)),
    
    ret1_mean = mean(log_ret1, na.rm = TRUE),
    ret1_sd = sd(log_ret1, na.rm = TRUE),
    ret1_max = max(log_ret1, na.rm = TRUE),
    ret1_min = min(log_ret1, na.rm = TRUE),
    
    ret2_mean = mean(log_ret2, na.rm = TRUE),
    ret2_sd = sd(log_ret2, na.rm = TRUE),
    
    # Spread
    spread1_mean = mean(spread1, na.rm = TRUE),
    spread2_mean = mean(spread2, na.rm = TRUE),
    
    spread1_sd = sd(spread1, na.rm = TRUE),
    spread2_sd = sd(spread2, na.rm = TRUE),
    
    # Volume
    volume_total_mean = mean(volume_total, na.rm = TRUE),
    volume_total_sd = sd(volume_total, na.rm = TRUE),
    
    # Imbalance
    imbalance1_mean = mean(imbalance1, na.rm = TRUE),
    imbalance2_mean = mean(imbalance2, na.rm = TRUE),
    
    imbalance1_sd = sd(imbalance1, na.rm = TRUE),
    imbalance2_sd = sd(imbalance2, na.rm = TRUE)
    
  ), by = .(stock_id, time_id)]
  
  

  # 后5分钟 target

  target <- second_half[, .(
    rv_second = sqrt(sum(log_ret1^2, na.rm = TRUE))
  ), by = .(stock_id, time_id)]
  
  target[, target := log(pmax(rv_second, 1e-8))]
 
  

  # 合并

  stock_data <- merge(
    features,
    target[, .(stock_id, time_id, target, rv_second)],
    by = c("stock_id", "time_id")
  )
  
  stock_data <- stock_data[complete.cases(stock_data)]
  
  return(stock_data)
}



stock_data <- make_stock_data(files[2])

names(stock_data)
dim(stock_data)
head(stock_data)
summary(stock_data)
```



```{r}
fit_lasso_stock <- function(file_path) {
  
  cat("\n====================================\n")
  cat("Processing:", file_path, "\n")
  
  stock_data <- make_stock_data(file_path)
  
  # 数据太少则跳过
  if (nrow(stock_data) < 50) {
    cat("Too few observations, skipped.\n")
    return(NULL)
  }
  
  # 时间序列切分

  setorder(stock_data, time_id)
  
  n <- nrow(stock_data)
  split_point <- floor(0.8 * n)
  
  train_set <- stock_data[1:split_point]
  test_set  <- stock_data[(split_point + 1):n]
  

  # 准备矩阵
  x_train <- as.matrix(
    train_set[, !c("stock_id", "time_id", "target", "rv_second")]
  )
  
  y_train <- train_set$target
  
  x_test <- as.matrix(
    test_set[, !c("stock_id", "time_id", "target", "rv_second")]
  )
  
  y_test <- test_set$target
  
  
  set.seed(123)
  
  lasso_model <- cv.glmnet(
    x = x_train,
    y = y_train,
    alpha = 1
  )
  
  pred_log <- as.numeric(
    predict(
      lasso_model,
      s = "lambda.min",
      newx = x_test
    )
  )
  
  

  rmse_log <- sqrt(mean((y_test - pred_log)^2))
  
  actual_vol <- exp(y_test)
  pred_vol <- exp(pred_log)
  
  qlike_score <- qlike(actual_vol, pred_vol)
  

  result <- data.table(
    stock_id = unique(stock_data$stock_id),
    n_obs = nrow(stock_data),
    rmse_log = rmse_log,
    qlike = qlike_score,
    lambda = lasso_model$lambda.min
  )
  
  predictions <- data.table(
    stock_id = unique(stock_data$stock_id),
    time_id = test_set$time_id,
    actual_log_vol = y_test,
    predicted_log_vol = pred_log,
    actual_vol = actual_vol,
    predicted_vol = pred_vol
  )
  
  coefficients <- data.table(
    stock_id = unique(stock_data$stock_id),
    variable = rownames(coef(lasso_model, s = "lambda.min")),
    coefficient = as.numeric(coef(lasso_model, s = "lambda.min"))
  )
  
  return(list(
    result = result,
    predictions = predictions,
    coefficients = coefficients
  ))
}


# STEP 6. 对所有股票自动循环
all_outputs <- lapply(files, fit_lasso_stock)

# 去除NULL
all_outputs <- Filter(Negate(is.null), all_outputs)


# STEP 7. 汇总所有股票结果
all_results <- rbindlist(
  lapply(all_outputs, function(x) x$result),
  fill = TRUE
)

all_predictions <- rbindlist(
  lapply(all_outputs, function(x) x$predictions),
  fill = TRUE
)

all_coefficients <- rbindlist(
  lapply(all_outputs, function(x) x$coefficients),
  fill = TRUE
)


# STEP 8. 输出整体表现
cat("\n====================================\n")
cat("ALL STOCK RESULTS:\n")
print(all_results)

cat("\nAverage Performance:\n")
print(all_results[, .(
  mean_rmse = mean(rmse_log, na.rm = TRUE),
  mean_qlike = mean(qlike, na.rm = TRUE)
)])

# STEP 9. 查看所有股票未来波动率
cat("\n====================================\n")
cat("ALL FUTURE VOLATILITY PREDICTIONS:\n")
print(head(all_predictions))



```
